text: I feel a gentle disorientation as I move from the open, industrial corridor into this curated exhibit space. The juxtaposition of glass, color, and intention draws me in. The display, with its bold 'R + D', asks me to reflect on how we search for understanding amidst noise and data. Reading the poetic caption on the screen, I feel comforted by the chaos—the idea that meaning emerges from confusion. Here, I am both participant and observer, feeling curiosity mixed with acceptance of the unresolved.
